reviews.review_description:
It was great experience felt like i was in medina, even tho i was  expecting a longer story it was fun 

SPOILER: in masjid seeing prophet Mohammed as a shining star was a great symbolism i really hope you guys come up with other projects too 
Good Luck!

developer_response.body:
Hello pb1_11,
thank you for your kind wishes. We are happy to see you liked it. As it is a totally voluntary project we can only develop in small steps. But we want to continue more and more Sahaba in the streets of Medina with exciting quests and possibilities to learn more about them. 

Stay tuned :)
